sentences.english: On weekends I sleep until ten o'clock.
Then I eat a big breakfast with my family.
My dad makes pancakes every Sunday and they are the best.
sentences.korean: 아빠가 매주 일요일 팬케이크를 만드는데 최고예요.

sentences.english: After breakfast I watch cartoons or play video games.
sentences.korean: 아침 후에 만화를 보거나 비디오 게임을 해요.

sentences.english: Weekend mornings are my happiest time of the week.
sentences.korean: 주말 아침이 일주일 중 가장 행복한 시간이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
